title: Emptiness
content:
The threadbare uniforms
    we let stare at others
    we would refuse ourselves.

    The bare walls, misunderstanding,
    Support nothing,
    taut empty sounds.

    The inclusion of everything
    excludes nothing
    except why it was done.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Emptiness"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
